subcodes.first_line: O 'Attar! Thou hast discovered the fragrance of My days, heard My call, turned towards My horizon, and voiced My praise [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عطار وجدت عطر ایامی و سمعت ندائی و اقبلت الی افقی و نطقت بثنائی
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @chastisement and requital
